name: Snappy Frozen Pumpkin Dessert
recipeIngredient: 32 ginger snap cookies (about 2 inches in diameter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the cookies in the bottom of a 9x9x2 inch pan.
2. Mix together the brown sugar, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg in a bowl.
3. Add the pumpkin to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
4. Stir in the softened ice cream until thoroughly mixed.
5. Pour half of the mixture over the cookies.
6. Cover with more ice cream mixture.
7. Sprinkle with pecans.
8. Cover the pan with waxed paper or foil.
9. Freeze until firm, about 2 hours.
10. Cut into serving portions (about 3x2 inches).
11. Top with whipped cream and a large pecan.
12. Serve with an orange slice or additional canned pumpkin on top for garnish.
